mapper.sql: fds.id, fds.date, fds.dept_id, fds.dept_name, fds.parent_id, fds.dept_code, fds.dept_level, fds.dept_sequence, fds.attribute1, fds.attribute2, fds.attribute3, fds.attribute4, fds.attribute5, fds.create_by, fds.create_time, fds.update_by, fds.update_time, fds.attendance_id,fds.dept,fds.department, fds.team, fds.admin_job_id

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.parent_id as ${tAlias}_parent_id, ${tAlias}.dept_code as ${tAlias}_dept_code, ${tAlias}.dept_level as ${tAlias}_dept_level, ${tAlias}.dept_sequence as ${tAlias}_dept_sequence, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.attendance_id as ${tAlias}_attendance_id, ${tAlias}.dept as ${tAlias}_dept,${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team,${tAlias}.admin_job_id as ${tAlias}_admin_job_id
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_dept_snapshot (date, dept_id, dept_name, parent_id, dept_code, dept_level, dept_sequence, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, attendance_id ,dept, department, team, admin_job_id ) values (#{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptSequence,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{attendanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminJobId, jdbcType = BIGINT})

insert into fnd_dept_snapshot (date, dept_id, dept_name, parent_id, dept_code, dept_level, dept_sequence, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, dept, department, team, admin_job_id) select #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, fd.id, fd.dept_name, fd.parent_id, fd.dept_code, fd.dept_level, fd.dept_sequence, '', '', '', '', '', #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ( SELECT temp.dept_name FROM fnd_dept temp WHERE temp.id = fd.ext_dept_id ) AS dept, ( SELECT temp.dept_name FROM fnd_dept temp WHERE temp.id = fd.ext_department_id ) AS department, ( SELECT temp.dept_name FROM fnd_dept temp WHERE temp.id = fd.ext_team_id ) AS team, fd.admin_job_id from fnd_dept fd where enabled_flag = 1 and deleted_flag = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from fnd_dept_snapshot fds where fds.date=#{date,jdbcType=DATE}
mapper.update: update fnd_dept_snapshot set date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_code = #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_level = #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_sequence = #{deptSequence,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attendance_id = #{attendanceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept = #{dept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin_job_id = #{adminJobId, jdbcType= BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
